revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= }} [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. Up to nine parameters may be used for situations where a unique publication appears more than once in the OCLC [[:en:Union catalog|Union catalog]]. Multiple publications are separated by ",", but the word between the last two publications can be configured using the 'leadout' parameter (f.e. 'leadout=and', 'leadout=or', 'leadout=as well as' or 'leadout=,'. It is also possible to link to all editions of a publication at once using the 'show=all' parameter (whereby "all" is a special token, causing the display of "(all editions)". The text between parentheses can be changed by specifying a different text using the 'show' parameter. ;Example #1 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} ;Example #2 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/46908525] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50074837] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|46908525|50074837}} ;Example #3 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975}} ;Example #4 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/12345678], [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/98765432] and [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/24680975] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|12345678|98765432|24680975|leadout=and}} ;Example #5 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=all}} ;Example #6 *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204/editions] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204|show=complete list of all editions}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC search link}}{{snd}}a similar template without the "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{sandbox other|1=|2= }} [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
